stem: The equation y = -3x + 24 represents the speed y, in feet per second, of Marcus's scooter x seconds after he applied the brakes at the end of a ride. If the equation is graphed in the xy-plane, which of the following is the best interpretation of the x-coordinate of the line's x-intercept in the context of the problem?

answerOptions.content: The speed of Marcus's scooter, in feet per second, before Marcus applied the brakes.
The number of feet per second the speed of the scooter decreased each second after Marcus applied the brakes.
The number of feet Marcus's scooter traveled from the time he applied the brakes until the scooter stopped.
The number of seconds it took from the time Marcus began applying the brakes until the scooter came to a complete stop.

rationale: Choice D is correct. The x-intercept is where y = 0; in this context, y = 0 means the scooter has stopped. The x-coordinate of the x-intercept therefore represents the time (in seconds) from when the brakes were applied until the scooter came to rest. Choice A describes the y-intercept. Choice B describes the slope's magnitude. Choice C describes a distance, not a time.
